name: Se-ri is Back
overview: A drama depicting the misadventures of Se-ri, a wealthy heiress who abruptly returns from studying abroad and checks in on the "lovers she left behind."

trailers.title: Lee Byung-hun, Im Chang-jung, Lee Ji-eun. A free-love story passionately performed by top actors, 'Se-ri is Back' (1999) [Generation Sympathy Saturday: Hometown of Stars] | KBS Broadcast 20110319
